data.title: Suspects Charged in Crypto Wrench Attacks Using Fake Deliveries
data.description: Three individuals have been charged in connection with two separate crypto wrench attack incidents involving fake DoorDash and Uber Eats deliveries. According to NS3.AI, authorities suspect these men are part of a larger operation targeting significant cryptocurrency holders through similar criminal activities. The cases highlight the growing trend of using deceptive tactics to access digital assets unlawfully.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Analyst Predicts Prolonged Closure of Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Morgan Stanley energy analyst Martijn Rats has projected that the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, which has disrupted over 20% of the global oil flow, will persist until the end of April. According to NS3.AI, Rats anticipates that oil flows may only gradually recover following this period.

data.title: Iran Conflict Resolution Efforts Progress, Pakistani PM Urges Ceasefire
data.description: Pakistani Prime Minister has requested U.S. President Donald Trump to extend the deadline for Iran by two weeks, urging all parties involved in the conflict to cease hostilities for the same period to facilitate diplomatic efforts for a complete resolution of the war in Iran. According to Jin10, he emphasized that diplomatic efforts aimed at peacefully resolving the ongoing Middle Eastern conflict are steadily advancing. He also called on Iran to demonstrate goodwill by opening the Strait of Hormuz within the next two weeks. The market reacted swiftly to this information, with WTI crude oil dropping $2 in the short term, spot gold surging nearly $40 and breaking the $4,700 mark, while U.S. stocks saw a slight uptick.

data.title: AI TRENDS | MemPalace AI Tool Gains Traction with 10,000 GitHub Stars
data.description:
Milla Jovovich announced her involvement in developing MemPalace, an open-source AI knowledge tool that has quickly gained popularity. According to NS3.AI, the tool, which organizes documents in virtual rooms rather than using traditional keyword searches, achieved 10,000 GitHub stars and 50 pull requests within 24 hours of its release. Ben Sigman highlighted this rapid adoption as a significant milestone.

Sean Ren, a computer science professor at USC and CEO of Sahara AI, commented on the potential of MemPalace's method to be applied across various AI frameworks. However, he noted that the performance claims of the system have yet to be validated outside of controlled testing environments.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Gold Surpasses $4,700 per Ounce with 1.08% Daily Increase
data.description: Spot gold prices have surged past $4,700 per ounce, marking a 1.08% increase within the day. According to Jin10, this rise in gold prices reflects ongoing market dynamics and investor sentiment. The precious metal continues to attract attention as a safe-haven asset amid global economic uncertainties. Analysts suggest that factors such as inflation concerns and geopolitical tensions may be contributing to the upward trend in gold prices. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as they assess the potential impact on their portfolios.

data.title: Gold Prices Surge as WTI Crude Dips $2 Amid Pakistan's Request to Trump
data.description: Gold prices experienced a short-term surge, while WTI crude oil saw a $2 drop. According to Jin10, Pakistan's Prime Minister has requested U.S. President Donald Trump to extend the deadline for Iran by two weeks. This development has influenced market dynamics, leading to fluctuations in commodity prices. The request from Pakistan comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, which continue to impact global markets.

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Warns of Inflation Risks Due to War-Related Supply Shocks
data.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon has cautioned shareholders about potential inflationary pressures in 2026, driven by supply shocks related to ongoing conflicts. According to NS3.AI, Dimon highlighted disruptions in energy, commodity products, shipbuilding, and farming as key factors emerging from the conflicts in Iran and Ukraine. He also referenced a Congressional Budget Office forecast predicting an increase in the US debt-to-GDP ratio from 100% currently to 120% by 2036.

data.title: U.S. February Consumer Credit Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: U.S. consumer credit for February was reported at $9.48 billion, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the anticipated $10.25 billion. The previous value was revised from $8.05 billion to $7.67 billion.

data.title: FDIC Proposes Stablecoin Issuer Framework Under GENIUS Act
data.description:
The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) has introduced a proposed framework for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act, initiating a 60-day public comment period with 144 questions. According to NS3.AI, the draft outlines capital, liquidity, and custody standards for U.S. depository institutions issuing stablecoins through subsidiaries. However, the final rule will be established only after further review.

The proposal specifies that payment stablecoins will not be covered by deposit insurance, whereas tokenized deposits that meet the statutory definition of deposits will be treated similarly to other deposits. Additionally, the draft states that issuers are prohibited from claiming that payment stablecoins offer interest or yield simply for holding or using them, including through third-party arrangements.

data.title: Polymarket to Launch USD Token Backed by USDC
data.description: Polymarket is set to launch Polymarket USD, a new platform token backed 1:1 by native USDC, as it transitions away from using bridged USDC.e on the Polygon network. According to NS3.AI, this shift will modify the collateral layer visible to users without directly decreasing the USDC supply. However, it introduces a reliance on Polymarket's redemption framework and smart-contract configuration.

data.title: U.S. Stocks Decline Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Crude Oil Surge
data.description:
U.S. stocks experienced a decline on April 7, driven by geopolitical tensions and rising crude oil prices. According to NS3.AI, U.S. President Donald Trump's warning ahead of his Tuesday deadline concerning the Strait of Hormuz contributed to renewed fears in the equity markets. Additionally, the price of WTI crude oil reached $115.19, further unsettling investors.

Reports of Israeli strikes on Iran's Kharg Island petrochemical infrastructure dashed hopes for de-escalation, which had briefly buoyed the markets. In the tech sector, Apple shares fell by 3.35% following a report from Nikkei Asia about engineering setbacks in the development of a foldable iPhone, adding pressure to the S&P 500 index.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic Engages with U.S. Officials on Claude Mythos Preview
data.description: Anthropic is actively engaging with U.S. government officials regarding the preview version of Claude Mythos, focusing on its offensive and defensive cyber capabilities. According to Jin10, these discussions aim to address the potential implications and applications of Claude Mythos in cybersecurity. The collaboration highlights the growing interest in AI-driven solutions for national security and cyber defense. Anthropic's initiative reflects the broader trend of integrating advanced AI technologies into governmental frameworks to enhance security measures.

data.title: UN Envoy Travels to Tehran for Diplomatic Talks
data.description: Iran's ambassador to the United Nations announced that the UN Secretary-General's personal envoy is visiting Tehran to further negotiations. According to NS3.AI, this visit is considered a proactive diplomatic effort.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic and Partners Announce 'GLASSWING' Project Plan
data.description: Anthropic has unveiled its latest initiative, the 'GLASSWING' project, in collaboration with its partners. According to Jin10, this project aims to advance AI technology and foster innovation in the field. The announcement marks a significant step for Anthropic as it continues to expand its influence in the AI industry. Details regarding the project's objectives and potential impact are expected to be released in the coming months.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,100 USDT with a Narrowed 1.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 07, 2026, 17:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,100 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,108.290039 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.32% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: SOL Price Narrowly Declines After Surpassing 80 USDT
data.description: SOL has recently surpassed the 80 USDT mark, according to Odaily. The current price stands at 80.01 USDT, with the 24-hour decline narrowing to 2.06%. This development highlights a slight recovery in SOL's market performance.

data.title: House Democrats Question CFTC on Offshore War-Related Prediction Contracts
data.description: House Democrats have inquired about the measures the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) can take to prevent offshore platforms from offering prediction contracts related to war. According to NS3.AI, Representatives Seth Moulton and Jim McGovern spearheaded a letter to CFTC Chair Michael Selig, seeking responses by April 15. The lawmakers referenced a CFTC regulation that prohibits contracts involving war. In response to criticism, Polymarket announced the removal of a market related to rescue operations.

data.title: Solana Foundation Promotes Blockchain as Invisible Infrastructure with New Campaign
data.description: The Solana Foundation has initiated a billboard campaign in San Francisco with the message, “Don’t waste time with crypto,” to highlight blockchain as an invisible infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, the advertisement directs attention to x402, a payment system designed for agentic AI applications, enabling apps or AI agents to execute small automated payments.

data.title: Jupiter Introduces Express Verification API for Solana Token Creation
data.description: Jupiter has unveiled its new Express Verification API, designed to streamline token verification processes for launchpads, decentralized exchanges (DEXs), and AI agents within Solana's ecosystem. According to NS3.AI, this API allows users to integrate token checks into Solana creation flows by burning 1,000 JUP per request. Jupiter's documentation highlights that the submission process is gas-free, requiring developers to possess a wallet with a minimum of 1,000 JUP, while eliminating the need for SOL to cover fees.

data.title: Uber Leverages Amazon's AI Technology for Enhanced Services
data.description: Uber is integrating Amazon's custom AI chips and AWS infrastructure to enhance its AI models and support real-time services for millions of daily users. According to NS3.AI, Uber is increasingly utilizing AWS Graviton4 for more Trip Serving Zone workloads. Additionally, the company has initiated pilot training on Trainium to optimize rider and delivery matching.
